Vertical Transfer

Vertical transfer is the right of transition that students who complete the associate degree program and enter the DGS will obtain with the choice they will make in line with the score they receive. It allows students to transfer from one level of education (associate degree) to a higher level of education. A student who has completed an associate degree can make a vertical transfer to the relevant undergraduate program at Istanbul Galata University. This transition gives students the opportunity to pursue a more advanced education and advance their academic career. Vertical transfer allows students to specialize in a more specific field and acquire more advanced knowledge and skills in their field of interest.

https://www.osym.gov.tr/TR,29379/2024-dgs-kilavuz-ve-basvuru-bilgileri.html
